metadata.source: train-00000-of-00001.parquet, validation-00000-of-00001.parquet, pattern_examples.json, Thai normalization literature
metadata.description: Thai train-derived MFR dictionary for MultiLexNorm-style lexical normalization.
metadata.automatic_replacement_policy: Use only high_confidence_pairs for direct replacement. Use review_pairs and ambiguous_pairs only for context-aware prompts/model fallback.
metadata.strategy: Conservative dictionary-first for empirical high-confidence pairs; repeated-character, tone/vowel, homophonic, and OOV/transliteration cases are selected as candidates rather than blindly rewritten.
metadata.warning: Thai misspellings may carry sentiment/stance semantics. Direct normalization should remain data-driven and conservative; unseen expressive misspellings should be resolved by context-aware prompt/model or preserved.
